name: PegaProx
description: PegaProx is a powerful web-based management interface for Proxmox VE and XCP-ng clusters. Manage multiple clusters from a single dashboard with live monitoring, VM management, cross-cluster migrations, load balancing, and more.

notes.text: Access the web interface at https://<IP>:5000
Change the default password after first login!
Configuration and database are stored in /opt/PegaProx/config/
